commitMessage: Reapply "Reapply "Reapply "Reapply "Add R key to reset game from any state""""

topics.title: Add keyboard shortcut to reset the game at any time
topics.trigger: Players had no way to restart the snake game mid-session without refreshing the page or waiting for a game over screen. A dedicated reset key was needed so players could start fresh at any point.
topics.response:
- In `src/main.ts`, added an `R`/`r` key handler at the top of the existing keyboard input method so it fires before any other key logic, calling the new-game routine immediately regardless of current game state (running, paused, or game over).
- Also in `src/main.ts`, added a line to `startNewGame` that explicitly hides the pause overlay when a reset is triggered, preventing the pause UI from persisting into the new game session.
- Updated the on-screen controls label in `index.html` to include "Press R to Reset" so players are aware of the shortcut.
topics.decisions:
- **Reset takes priority over all other input**: The reset key check is placed before the pause and movement checks in the input handler. This ensures pressing R always works, even when the game is in a state where other keys are ignored, giving players a reliable escape hatch without needing to reach for the browser refresh.
- **Clearing the pause overlay on reset**: Rather than relying on the pause toggle logic to clean up its own state, the reset routine explicitly hides the pause screen. This prevents a subtle visual bug where resetting while paused would leave the pause overlay visible over the new game, which would have been confusing and required an extra keypress to dismiss.

recap: Players can now press R at any point during a snake game session to immediately restart, without waiting for a game over or refreshing the browser. The reset works from every game state — including while the game is running or paused — and the on-screen controls label has been updated to advertise the shortcut. Resetting while paused correctly clears the pause overlay, so the new game starts with a clean screen.
